task_completion.description: Identify the road segment to be closed from the target file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing the agent reading the contents of /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta/closure_target.txt (e.g., using cat, less, or opening it in an editor).

task_completion.description: Create a SUMO rerouter additional file to implement the closure.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Editor or terminal showing the creation of /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta/road_closure.add.xml containing <rerouter> tags, the closed edge, and a time interval of 0 to 86400s.

task_completion.description: Modify or create the SUMO configuration file to include the rerouter, ignore route errors, and output tripinfo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Editor or terminal showing /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta/closure_run.sumocfg being configured with the additional file (road_closure.add.xml), an option to ignore route errors (e.g., <ignore-route-errors value="true"/>), and tripinfo output set to closure_tripinfo.xml.
Terminal showing the execution of the 'sumo' command (not sumo-gui) using the closure_run.sumocfg file, along with the simulation progress or completion output.

task_completion.description: Generate a summary report comparing baseline and closure simulation results.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal or editor showing the creation and content of /home/ga/SUMO_Output/closure_report.txt, containing colon-separated key-value pairs for closed_edge, baseline_trips, closure_trips, baseline_avg_duration, closure_avg_duration, duration_change_seconds, and duration_change_percent.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually ran the SUMO simulation to generate the tripinfo.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for terminal output of the SUMO simulation running and completing, rather than the agent just creating a fake closure_tripinfo.xml file.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent calculated the metrics from the XML files rather than hallucinating them.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a python script, shell script, or terminal commands (like grep, awk, or python -c) used to parse baseline_tripinfo.xml and closure_tripinfo.xml to compute trip counts and average durations.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent ran SUMO in headless mode as requested.
integrity.visual_evidence: The command used should be 'sumo', not 'sumo-gui'. No SUMO graphical interface windows should be visible in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm:

Report file: /home/ga/SUMO_Output/closure_report.txt
